title: [ExportVerilog] Aggregate constant produces invalid assignment pattern

features.name: nested struct and array assignment pattern in concatenation
features.description: Code should include a struct field containing an array of structs, assigned using assignment pattern syntax inside a concatenation
features.snippet:
struct packed {struct packed {logic sink; }[0:0] mem; } bar;
assign bar = '{mem: {'{sink: 1'h0}};
